ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_share_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which market share data is recorded */,
  "total" REAL /* Total market share percentage */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "data_reliability" REAL /* Reliability or confidence level of the data */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the browser */,
  "first_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the browser was first released */,
  "last_release_date" TEXT /* Date of the last major release of the browser */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Company or organization that developed the browser */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the browser is still actively developed and supported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., IE 8, Chrome 74) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* Date when the version is no longer supported */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the version is the current stable release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the data source is trusted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "internet_usage_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that uses the internet */,
  "data_coverage" REAL /* Score indicating the coverage of market share data in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_share_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser the trend belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the trend belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "market_share_change" REAL /* Change in market share over the trend period */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the trend is recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source of the trend */,
  "trend_category" TEXT /* Category to classify the trend (e.g., global, regional, device-specific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_trends_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_trends_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser the forecast belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the forecast belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the forecast period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the forecast period */,
  "forecasted_market_share" REAL /* Forecasted market share */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the forecast is made */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source of the forecast */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the forecast (e.g., linear regression, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market share, trend analysis) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source used to generate the report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the report is generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., market share, trend analysis) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source used to create the dashboard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the dashboard is created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "export_history" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel, PDF) */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of data exported (e.g., market share, trend analysis) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source from which the data was exported */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the data was exported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_history_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_share_data_sources" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which market share data is recorded */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share percentage */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "data_reliability" REAL /* Reliability or confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_sources_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_sources_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_sources_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_share_data_versions" (
  "version_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which market share data is recorded */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share percentage */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "data_reliability" REAL /* Reliability or confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_versions_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_share_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_data_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
